description: Delegated credential claims a scope value that does not match the scopeCommitment binding. The Delegation circuit enforces scopeCommitment = Poseidon(delegatorCredCommitment, delegateeCredCommitment, scope). Providing a mismatched scope causes the constraint to fail.
failure_reason: scopeCommitment mismatch: Poseidon(delegatorCredCommitment, delegateeCredCommitment, scope) does not equal the provided scopeCommitment public input — the delegation circuit rejects scope values not committed by the delegator
